                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        0 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  = 
                                  b 
                               
                             to indicate that item  
                               p 
                             is solvable at level  
                               b 
                             in state  
                               
                                  
                                     K 
                                  
                                  
                                     0 
                                  
                               
                            . As we traverse along the tight path, the first instance where the response value of item  
                               p 
                             deviates from the level  
                               b 
                             occurs at  
                               
                                  
                                     K 
                                  
                                  
                                     4 
                                  
                               
                            , where  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        4 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  = 
                                  d 
                               
                            . Furthermore, in state  
                               
                                  
                                     K 
                                  
                                  
                                     5 
                                  
                               
                            , the response value of item  
                               p 
                             changes again to  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        5 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  = 
                                  c 
                               
                            . We denote the set of states where item  
                               p 
                             undergoes a response value change as  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        F 
                                     
                                     
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  = 
                                  
                                     { 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           4 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           5 
                                        
                                     
                                     } 
                                  
                               
                            . Moving on, we investigate the response values of the sequence  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        { 
                                        
                                           
                                              K 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                        } 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     i 
                                     = 
                                     0 
                                  
                                  
                                     5 
                                  
                               
                             for item  
                               q 
                             and find that it only changes at state  
                               
                                  
                                     K 
                                  
                                  
                                     2 
                                  
                               
                            . Therefore, we have  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        F 
                                     
                                     
                                        2 
                                     
                                  
                                  = 
                                  
                                     { 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           2 
                                        
                                     
                                     } 
                                  
                               
                             to represent the set of states causing the response value change for item  
                               q 
                            . Finally, for item  
                               r 
                            , the set  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        F 
                                     
                                     
                                        3 
                                     
                                  
                                  = 
                                  
                                     { 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           1 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           3 
                                        
                                     
                                     } 
                                  
                               
                             captures the elements where the response value of item  
                               r 
                             changes.

It is evident that the sets  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        F 
                                     
                                     
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        F 
                                     
                                     
                                        2 
                                     
                                  
                               
                            , and  
                               
                                  
                                     F 
                                  
                                  
                                     3 
                                  
                               
                             are mutually disjoint, while the union  
                               
                                  
                                     { 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           0 
                                        
                                     
                                     } 
                                  
                                  ∪ 
                                  
                                     
                                        F 
                                     
                                     
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  ∪ 
                                  
                                     
                                        F 
                                     
                                     
                                        2 
                                     
                                  
                                  ∪ 
                                  
                                     
                                        F 
                                     
                                     
                                        3 
                                     
                                  
                               
                             precisely encompasses all elements  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        { 
                                        
                                           
                                              K 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                        } 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     i 
                                     = 
                                     0 
                                  
                                  
                                     5 
                                  
                               
                             in the tight path from  
                               K 
                             to  
                               L 
                            .

If  
                         K 
                       and  
                         L 
                       are two elements in a non-empty well-graded family  
                         K 
                      , there exists a tight path  
                         
                            
                               K 
                            
                            
                               i 
                            
                         
                       
                      
                         
                            ( 
                            0 
                            ≤ 
                            i 
                            ≤ 
                            n 
                            ) 
                         
                       from  
                         K 
                       to  
                         L 
                      . According to  Remark 3.1 , for any  
                         
                            q 
                            ∈ 
                            Q 
                         
                      , we have  
                         
                            K 
                            
                               ( 
                               q 
                               ) 
                            
                            ∧ 
                            L 
                            
                               ( 
                               q 
                               ) 
                            
                            ≤ 
                            
                               
                                  K 
                               
                               
                                  i 
                               
                            
                            
                               ( 
                               q 
                               ) 
                            
                            ≤ 
                            K 
                            
                               ( 
                               q 
                               ) 
                            
                            ∨ 
                            L 
                            
                               ( 
                               q 
                               ) 
                            
                         
                      . This implies that  
                         
                            
                               K 
                            
                            
                               i 
                            
                         
                       belongs to the interval  
                         
                            [ 
                            K 
                            , 
                            L 
                            ] 
                         
                       for  
                         
                            0 
                            ≤ 
                            i 
                            ≤ 
                            n 
                         
                      . To provide further clarification, as the value of  
                         i 
                       increases, the range of  
                         
                            
                               K 
                            
                            
                               i 
                            
                         
                       progressively narrows down and approaches the element  
                         L 
                      . This notion is encapsulated in the following conclusion.

Lemma 3.1 
                         
                            Let  
                            
                               K 
                             
                            and  
                            
                               L 
                             
                            be two distinct elements of a non-empty well-graded family  
                            
                               K 
                            
                            . Assume a tight path from  
                            
                               K 
                             
                            to  
                            
                               L 
                             
                            is given by  
                            
                               
                                  K 
                                  = 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        0 
                                     
                                  
                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  , 
                                  … 
                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        n 
                                     
                                  
                                  = 
                                  L 
                               
                            
                            , then for  
                            
                               
                                  1 
                                  ≤ 
                                  i 
                                  ≤ 
                                  n 
                               
                            
                            , we have  
                            
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  ∈ 
                                  
                                     [ 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                           − 
                                           1 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     L 
                                     ] 
                                  
                               
                            
                            .

Let  
                            
                               K 
                             
                            and  
                            
                               L 
                             
                            be two distinct elements of a non-empty well-graded family  
                            
                               K 
                            
                            . Assume a tight path from  
                            
                               K 
                             
                            to  
                            
                               L 
                             
                            is given by  
                            
                               
                                  K 
                                  =

                                        K

                                  , 
                                  … 
                                  ,

                                        n 
                                     
                                  
                                  = 
                                  L

                                  1 
                                  ≤ 
                                  i 
                                  ≤ 
                                  n

                                           1 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     L 
                                     ]

Proof 
                         Let  
                               K 
                             be a well-graded family, and let  
                               K 
                             and  
                               L 
                             be two distinct elements in  
                               K 
                            . Suppose there exists a tight path  
                               
                                  K 
                                  = 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        0 
                                     
                                  
                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  , 
                                  … 
                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        n 
                                     
                                  
                                  = 
                                  L 
                               
                             from  
                               K 
                             to  
                               L 
                            , where  
                               
                                  d 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                           − 
                                           1 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  = 
                                  1 
                               
                             for  
                               
                                  1 
                                  ≤ 
                                  i 
                                  ≤ 
                                  n 
                               
                             and  
                               
                                  d 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     K 
                                     , 
                                     L 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  = 
                                  n 
                               
                            . In this context,  
                               
                                  d 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                           − 
                                           1 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  = 
                                  1 
                               
                             implies the existence of an item  
                               
                                  p 
                                  ∈ 
                                  Q 
                               
                             such that  
                               
                                  δ 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        p 
                                        ) 
                                     
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                           − 
                                           1 
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        p 
                                        ) 
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  = 
                                  1 
                               
                            , while  
                               
                                  δ 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        q 
                                        ) 
                                     
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                           − 
                                           1 
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        q 
                                        ) 
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  = 
                                  0 
                               
                             for all  
                               
                                  q 
                                  ∈ 
                                  Q 
                                  ∖ 
                                  
                                     { 
                                     p 
                                     } 
                                  
                               
                            . 
                         Let us assume that  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                        − 
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  ⊑ 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                               
                            . This implies  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                        − 
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ≤ 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                            , which further leads to  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                        − 
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ∧ 
                                  L 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ≤ 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                            . Next, we demonstrate that  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ≤ 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                        − 
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ∨ 
                                  L 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                            . If  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                        − 
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                             and  
                               
                                  L 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     )

                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                        − 
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ≤ 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                             with the explanation in  Remark 3.1 ’s latter part, it is evident that  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                        − 
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                             monotonically increases to reach  
                               
                                  L 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                            , hence  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                        − 
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ≤ 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ≤ 
                                  L 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  = 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                        − 
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ∨ 
                                  L 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                            . If  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                        − 
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                             and  
                               
                                  L 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                             are incomparable, as also explained in the latter part of  Remark 3.1 ,

                                        i 
                                        − 
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     )

                                  L 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                            , and we have  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                        − 
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ≤ 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ≤ 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                        − 
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ∨ 
                                  L 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                            . Thus, we have established that  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ≤ 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                        − 
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ∨ 
                                  L 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     p 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                            , leading to the inequality:  
                               
                                  (5) 
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              K 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                              − 
                                              1 
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           p 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                        ∧ 
                                        L 
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           p 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                        ≤ 
                                        
                                           
                                              K 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           p 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                        ≤ 
                                        
                                           
                                              K 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                              − 
                                              1 
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           p 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                        ∨ 
                                        L 
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           p 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                        . 
                                     
                                  
                               
                            For the alternative assumption, namely  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  ⊑ 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                        − 
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                               
                            , a similar method can also be applied to establish that Eq.  (5)  holds. 
                         For any  
                               
                                  q 
                                  ∈ 
                                  Q 
                               
                             with  
                               
                                  q 
                                  ≠ 
                                  p 
                               
                            , we have  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        K

                                        − 
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     q

                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     q 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                            . It is straightforward to observe that

                                           ( 
                                           q 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                        ∧

                                           ( 
                                           q

                                              −

                                           ( 
                                           q

                                        =

                                           q

                                           q 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                        ∨ 
                                        L 
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           q 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               
                            From  (5) and (6) , we deduce that  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                        − 
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  ⋒ 
                                  L 
                                  ⊑ 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  ⊑ 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                        − 
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  ⋓ 
                                  L 
                               
                            , which implies that  
                               
                                  
                                     K 
                                  
                                  
                                     i 
                                  
                               
                             belongs to the interval  
                               
                                  [ 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                        − 
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  , 
                                  L 
                                  ]

Following the explanation after  Definition 2.1 , it is understood that in a general family  
                         K 
                      , the distance between two adjacent elements  
                         K 
                       and  
                         L 
                       may not necessarily be 1. However, the scenario is quite different for a well-graded family, as elucidated in the following theorem.

Theorem 3.1 
                         
                            Let  
                            
                               
                                  K 
                                  ⊆ 
                                  
                                     
                                        V 
                                     
                                     
                                        Q 
                                     
                                  
                               
                             
                            be a non-empty family. The following statements are equivalent: 
                         
                         
                            (i)  
                            
                               K 
                             
                            is well-graded. 
                         
                         
                            (ii) For two distinct elements  
                            
                               K 
                             
                            and  
                            
                               L 
                             
                            in  
                            
                               K 
                            
                            , there exists a stepwise path  
                            
                               
                                  K 
                                  = 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        0 
                                     
                                  
                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        1 
                                     
                                  
                                  , 
                                  … 
                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        n 
                                     
                                  
                                  = 
                                  L 
                               
                             
                            such that for  
                            
                               
                                  1 
                                  ≤ 
                                  i 
                                  ≤ 
                                  n 
                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  ∈ 
                                  
                                     [ 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                           − 
                                           1 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     L 
                                     ] 
                                  
                               
                            
                            .

                                  d

                                  2
