Here are two definitions, one related to discriminative polytomous structure from  Stefanutti et al. (2020) , and the other provided by this paper.

Definition 4.1 
                            (i) The polytomous structure  
                                  K 
                                is considered to be  discriminative  if, for any item  
                                  
                                     q 
                                     ∈ 
                                     Q 
                                  
                               , the belief of  
                                  q 
                                is a singleton set. Here, a  belief  of  
                                  q 
                                is defined as  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           q 
                                        
                                        
                                           ♢ 
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        p 
                                        ∈ 
                                        Q 
                                        ∣ 
                                        K 
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           p 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                        = 
                                        K 
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           q 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                        for any 
                                        K 
                                        ∈ 
                                        K 
                                        } 
                                     
                                  
                               . 
                            (ii) The polytomous structure  
                                  K 
                                is considered to be  strongly discriminative  if, for any distinct virtual items  
                                  
                                     
                                        p 
                                     
                                     
                                        v 
                                     
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        w 
                                     
                                  
                                in  
                                  
                                     Q 
                                     × 
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        V 
                                        ∖ 
                                        
                                           { 
                                           ⊥ 
                                           } 
                                        
                                        ) 
                                     
                                  
                               , there exists a polytomous state  
                                  K 
                                in  
                                  K 
                                such that its extended state  
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        ∗ 
                                     
                                  
                                separates them. In other words, there exists a polytomous state  
                                  K 
                                where either  
                                  
                                     
                                        p 
                                     
                                     
                                        v 
                                     
                                  
                                is included in  
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        ∗ 
                                     
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        w 
                                     
                                  
                                is not, or vice versa.

(i) The polytomous structure  
                                  K 
                                is considered to be  discriminative  if, for any item  
                                  
                                     q 
                                     ∈ 
                                     Q 
                                  
                               , the belief of  
                                  q 
                                is a singleton set. Here, a  belief  of  
                                  q 
                                is defined as  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           q 
                                        
                                        
                                           ♢ 
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        p 
                                        ∈ 
                                        Q 
                                        ∣ 
                                        K 
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           p 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                        = 
                                        K 
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           q 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                        for any 
                                        K 
                                        ∈ 
                                        K 
                                        } 
                                     
                                  
                               .

(ii) The polytomous structure  
                                  K 
                                is considered to be  strongly discriminative  if, for any distinct virtual items  
                                  
                                     
                                        p 
                                     
                                     
                                        v 
                                     
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        w 
                                     
                                  
                                in  
                                  
                                     Q 
                                     × 
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        V 
                                        ∖ 
                                        
                                           { 
                                           ⊥ 
                                           } 
                                        
                                        ) 
                                     
                                  
                               , there exists a polytomous state  
                                  K 
                                in  
                                  K 
                                such that its extended state  
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        ∗ 
                                     
                                  
                                separates them. In other words, there exists a polytomous state  
                                  K 
                                where either  
                                  
                                     
                                        p 
                                     
                                     
                                        v 
                                     
                                  
                                is included in  
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        ∗ 
                                     
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        w 
                                     
                                  
                                is not, or vice versa.

If the belief set of item  
                            q 
                          contains more than one item, an intriguing finding from  Sun, Li, He, et al. (2023, Proposition 1)  reveals that different items  
                            p 
                          in the set  
                            
                               
                                  q 
                               
                               
                                  ♢ 
                               
                            
                          share certain similarities.

Lemma 4.1 
                            
                               Assuming that  
                               
                                  
                                     K 
                                     ⊆ 
                                     
                                        
                                           V 
                                        
                                        
                                           Q 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                
                               is a polytomous structure, and  
                               
                                  
                                     p 
                                     , 
                                     q 
                                     ∈ 
                                     Q 
                                  
                                
                               are two distinct items, the following statements are all equivalent: 
                            
                            
                               (i)  
                               
                                  
                                     p 
                                     ∈ 
                                     
                                        
                                           q 
                                        
                                        
                                           ♢ 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               
                               . 
                            
                            
                               (ii)  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 p 
                                              
                                              
                                                 v 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                           ∗ 
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 q 
                                              
                                              
                                                 v 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                           ∗ 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                
                               for any  
                               
                                  
                                     v 
                                     ∈ 
                                     V 
                                  
                               
                               . 
                            
                            
                               (iii)  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 p 
                                              
                                              
                                                 v 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 q 
                                              
                                              
                                                 v 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                
                               for any  
                               
                                  
                                     v 
                                     ∈ 
                                     V 
                                  
                               
                               .

Assuming that  
                               
                                  
                                     K 
                                     ⊆ 
                                     
                                        
                                           V 
                                        
                                        
                                           Q 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                
                               is a polytomous structure, and  
                               
                                  
                                     p 
                                     , 
                                     q 
                                     ∈ 
                                     Q 
                                  
                                
                               are two distinct items, the following statements are all equivalent:

(i)  
                               
                                  
                                     p 
                                     ∈ 
                                     
                                        
                                           q 
                                        
                                        
                                           ♢ 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               
                               .

(ii)  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 p 
                                              
                                              
                                                 v 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                           ∗ 
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 q 
                                              
                                              
                                                 v 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                           ∗ 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                
                               for any  
                               
                                  
                                     v 
                                     ∈ 
                                     V

(iii)  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 p 
                                              
                                              
                                                 v 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 q 
                                              
                                              
                                                 v 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                
                               for any  
                               
                                  
                                     v 
                                     ∈ 
                                     V 
                                  
                               
                               .

Upon comparing the definition of the well-gradedness property with the aforementioned two concepts in  Definition 4.1 , it is not difficult to discern their interrelation.

Theorem 4.1 
                            
                               Let  
                               
                                  
                                     K 
                                     ⊆ 
                                     
                                        
                                           V 
                                        
                                        
                                           Q 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                
                               be a polytomous structure. 
                            
                            
                               (i) If  
                               
                                  K 
                                
                               is strongly discriminative, then it is also discriminative. 
                            
                            
                               (ii) If  
                               
                                  K 
                                
                               is well-graded, then it is strongly discriminative.

Let  
                               
                                  
                                     K 
                                     ⊆ 
                                     
                                        
                                           V 
                                        
                                        
                                           Q 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                
                               be a polytomous structure.

(i) If  
                               
                                  K 
                                
                               is strongly discriminative, then it is also discriminative.

(ii) If  
                               
                                  K 
                                
                               is well-graded, then it is strongly discriminative.

Proof 
                            (i) If  
                                  K 
                                is both strongly discriminative and non-discriminative, it implies the existence of an item  
                                  
                                     q 
                                     ∈ 
                                     Q 
                                  
                                for which the belief set  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        ♢ 
                                     
                                  
                                is not a singleton. Without loss of generality, let us assume that there is another item  
                                  p 
                                (distinct from  
                                  q 
                               ) in  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        ♢ 
                                     
                                  
                               . For any  
                                  
                                     v 
                                     ∈ 
                                     V 
                                     ∖ 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        ⊥ 
                                        } 
                                     
                                  
                               , since  
                                  K 
                                is strongly discriminative, there exists a polytomous state  
                                  K 
                                such that  
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        ∗ 
                                     
                                  
                                separates  
                                  
                                     
                                        p 
                                     
                                     
                                        v 
                                     
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        v 
                                     
                                  
                               . Consequently,  
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              p 
                                           
                                           
                                              v 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        ∗ 
                                     
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              q 
                                           
                                           
                                              v 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        ∗ 
                                     
                                  
                                are not equal for at least one value  
                                  
                                     v 
                                     ∈ 
                                     V 
                                  
                               . As mentioned in  Lemma 4.1  (ii), this implies that  
                                  p 
                                cannot be in  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        ♢ 
                                     
                                  
                               , which contradicts our initial assumption. 
                            (ii) Consider any two distinct virtual items  
                                  
                                     
                                        p 
                                     
                                     
                                        v 
                                     
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        w 
                                     
                                  
                                in  
                                  
                                     Q 
                                     × 
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        V 
                                        ∖ 
                                        
                                           { 
                                           ⊥ 
                                           } 
                                        
                                        ) 
                                     
                                  
                               . Since  
                                  K 
                                is a polytomous knowledge structure, there exists a polytomous state  
                                  K 
                                such that  
                                  
                                     
                                        p 
                                     
                                     
                                        v 
                                     
                                  
                                belongs to  
                                  K 
                               , implying that  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           v 
                                        
                                     
                                     ∈ 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           ∗ 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               . If  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           q 
                                        
                                        
                                           w 
                                        
                                     
                                     ∉ 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           ∗ 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               , we have found a polytomous state  
                                  K 
                                such that  
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        ∗ 
                                     
                                  
                                separates  
                                  
                                     
                                        p 
                                     
                                     
                                        v 
                                     
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        w 
                                     
                                  
                               . 
                            Now, suppose  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        w 
                                     
                                  
                                is in  
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        ∗ 
                                     
                                  
                               . Due to the well-gradedness property of  
                                  K 
                               , there exists a tight path from  
                                  
                                     Q 
                                     × 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        ⊥ 
                                        } 
                                     
                                  
                                to  
                                  K 
                               , denoted as  
                                  
                                     Q 
                                     × 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        ⊥ 
                                        } 
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        
                                           L 
                                        
                                        
                                           0 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           L 
                                        
                                        
                                           1 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     … 
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           L 
                                        
                                        
                                           n 
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     K 
                                  
                               . Since  
                                  v 
                                and  
                                  w 
                                are in  
                                  
                                     V 
                                     ∖ 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        ⊥ 
                                        } 
                                     
                                  
                               , there must exist an  
                                  
                                     
                                        L 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                ( 
                                  
                                     1 
                                     ≤ 
                                     i 
                                     ≤ 
                                     n 
                                     − 
                                     1 
                                  
                               ) such that  
                                  
                                     
                                        L 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                     
                                        ∗ 
                                     
                                  
                                contains only one of  
                                  
                                     
                                        p 
                                     
                                     
                                        v 
                                     
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        w 
                                     
                                  
                               . In other words,  
                                  
                                     
                                        L 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                     
                                        ∗ 
                                     
                                  
                                separates  
                                  
                                     
                                        p 
                                     
                                     
                                        v 
                                     
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        w 
                                     
                                  
                               . This completes the proof. □

(i) If  
                                  K 
                                is both strongly discriminative and non-discriminative, it implies the existence of an item  
                                  
                                     q 
                                     ∈ 
                                     Q 
                                  
                                for which the belief set  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        ♢ 
                                     
                                  
                                is not a singleton. Without loss of generality, let us assume that there is another item  
                                  p 
                                (distinct from  
                                  q 
                               ) in  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        ♢ 
                                     
                                  
                               . For any  
                                  
                                     v 
                                     ∈ 
                                     V 
                                     ∖ 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        ⊥ 
                                        } 
                                     
                                  
                               , since  
                                  K 
                                is strongly discriminative, there exists a polytomous state  
                                  K 
                                such that  
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        ∗ 
                                     
                                  
                                separates  
                                  
                                     
                                        p 
                                     
                                     
                                        v 
                                     
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        v 
                                     
                                  
                               . Consequently,  
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              p 
                                           
                                           
                                              v 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        ∗ 
                                     
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              q 
                                           
                                           
                                              v 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        ∗ 
                                     
                                  
                                are not equal for at least one value  
                                  
                                     v 
                                     ∈ 
                                     V 
                                  
                               . As mentioned in  Lemma 4.1  (ii), this implies that  
                                  p 
                                cannot be in  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        ♢ 
                                     
                                  
                               , which contradicts our initial assumption.

(ii) Consider any two distinct virtual items  
                                  
                                     
                                        p 
                                     
                                     
                                        v 
                                     
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        w 
                                     
                                  
                                in  
                                  
                                     Q 
                                     × 
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        V 
                                        ∖ 
                                        
                                           { 
                                           ⊥ 
                                           } 
                                        
                                        ) 
                                     
                                  
                               . Since  
                                  K 
                                is a polytomous knowledge structure, there exists a polytomous state  
                                  K 
                                such that  
                                  
                                     
                                        p 
                                     
                                     
                                        v 
                                     
                                  
                                belongs to  
                                  K 
                               , implying that  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           v 
                                        
                                     
                                     ∈ 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           ∗ 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               . If  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           q 
                                        
                                        
                                           w 
                                        
                                     
                                     ∉ 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           ∗

                                  K 
                                such that  
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        ∗ 
                                     
                                  
                                separates  
                                  
                                     
                                        p 
                                     
                                     
                                        v 
                                     
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        w

                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        w 
                                     
                                  
                                is in  
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        ∗

                                  K

                                     Q 
                                     ×

                                        ⊥ 
                                        }

                                  K

                                     Q 
                                     × 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        ⊥ 
                                        }

                                           n

                                     K

                                  v 
                                and  
                                  w

                                     ∖

                                        ⊥

                               . This completes the proof. □

The following example aims to demonstrate that the two concepts in  Definition 4.1  are not equivalent. In other words,  Theorem 4.1  
                         
                            
                               ( 
                               i 
                               ) 
                            
                          is irreversible.

Example 4.1 
                            Consider a polytomous structure with  
                                  
                                     Q 
                                     = 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        p 
                                        , 
                                        q 
                                        } 
                                     
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     V 
                                     = 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        a 
                                        , 
                                        b 
                                        , 
                                        c 
                                        , 
                                        d 
                                        } 
                                     
                                  
                               . Let  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     V 
                                     , 
                                     ≤ 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                be a modular lattice with the order relations  
                                  
                                     a 
                                     ≤ 
                                     b 
                                     ≤ 
                                     d 
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     a 
                                     ≤ 
                                     c 
                                     ≤ 
                                     d 
                                  
                               . The polytomous structure  
                                  
                                     K 
                                     = 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        a 
                                        a 
                                        , 
                                        a 
                                        b 
                                        , 
                                        b 
                                        c 
                                        , 
                                        b 
                                        d 
                                        , 
                                        c 
                                        a 
                                        , 
                                        c 
                                        b 
                                        , 
                                        d 
                                        c 
                                        , 
                                        d 
                                        d 
                                        } 
                                     
                                  
                                is defined. Firstly, it is easy to verify that  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           ♢ 
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        p 
                                        } 
                                     
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           q 
                                        
                                        
                                           ♢ 
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        q 
                                        } 
                                     
                                  
                               . This implies that the belief associated with each item in  
                                  Q 
                                is a singleton set, indicating the discriminative nature of  
                                  K 
                               . 
                            Furthermore, we observe that  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 p 
                                              
                                              
                                                 b 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                           ∗ 
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 ( 
                                                 b 
                                                 c 
                                                 ) 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ∗ 
                                           
                                        
                                        , 
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 ( 
                                                 b 
                                                 d 
                                                 ) 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ∗ 
                                           
                                        
                                        , 
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 ( 
                                                 d 
                                                 c 
                                                 ) 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ∗ 
                                           
                                        
                                        , 
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 ( 
                                                 d 
                                                 d 
                                                 ) 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ∗ 
                                           
                                        
                                        } 
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 q 
                                              
                                              
                                                 c 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                           ∗ 
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               . This implies that there is no polytomous state  
                                  K 
                                in  
                                  K 
                                whose extension  
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        ∗ 
                                     
                                  
                                can separate  
                                  
                                     
                                        p 
                                     
                                     
                                        b 
                                     
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                     
                                        c 
                                     
                                  
                               . Therefore, the polytomous structure  
                                  K 
                                is not strongly discriminative.

Consider a polytomous structure with  
                                  
                                     Q 
                                     = 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        p 
                                        , 
                                        q 
                                        } 
                                     
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     V 
                                     = 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        a 
                                        , 
                                        b 
                                        , 
                                        c 
                                        , 
                                        d 
                                        } 
                                     
                                  
                               . Let  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     V 
                                     , 
                                     ≤ 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                be a modular lattice with the order relations  
                                  
                                     a 
                                     ≤ 
                                     b 
                                     ≤ 
                                     d 
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     a 
                                     ≤ 
                                     c 
                                     ≤ 
                                     d 
                                  
                               . The polytomous structure  
                                  
                                     K 
                                     = 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        a 
                                        a 
                                        , 
                                        a 
                                        b 
                                        , 
                                        b 
                                        c 
                                        , 
                                        b 
                                        d 
                                        , 
                                        c 
                                        a 
                                        , 
                                        c 
                                        b 
                                        , 
                                        d 
                                        c 
                                        , 
                                        d 
                                        d 
                                        } 
                                     
                                  
                                is defined. Firstly, it is easy to verify that  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           ♢ 
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        p 
                                        } 
                                     
                                  
                                and  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           q 
                                        
                                        
                                           ♢ 
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        q 
                                        } 
                                     
                                  
                               . This implies that the belief associated with each item in  
                                  Q 
                                is a singleton set, indicating the discriminative nature of  
                                  K 
                               .

Furthermore, we observe that  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 p 
                                              
                                              
                                                 b 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                           ∗ 
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        {

                                                 b

                                                 )

                                                 b 
                                                 d 
                                                 ) 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ∗ 
                                           
                                        
                                        , 
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 ( 
                                                 d 
                                                 c 
                                                 ) 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ∗ 
                                           
                                        
                                        , 
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 ( 
                                                 d 
                                                 d 
                                                 ) 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              ∗ 
                                           
                                        
                                        }
